title: rosa lutetiana f. oxyphylla
intro: Rosa lutetiana f. oxyphylla is a variety of wild rose, specifically a fragrant, thorny shrub native to Europe. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa lutetiana f. oxyphylla include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic to promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and also used in the form of rose hips, which are rich in vitamins and antioxidants.
